checklist.label: Verification passed
checklist.detail: the project verify command was GREEN

checklist.label: Work committed
checklist.detail: committed locally on the build branch

checklist.label: Implements the approved plan
checklist.detail: Diff creates all three functions (normalizeText, wordCount, truncateWords) with exact acceptance-criteria behaviour, a barrel index re-exporting all three, and a vitest suite — the full objective per issue #48.

checklist.label: Minimal and scoped
checklist.detail: Only new files under apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/ (normalize-text.ts, word-count.ts, truncate-words.ts, index.ts, index.test.ts); no unrelated files touched, no existing code refactored.

Tests exercise real edge cases (empty/whitespace inputs, mixing whitespace types, boundary maxWords, ellipsis-only-when-truncated); functions compute results genuinely — no hard-coded returns or weakened assertions.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: All functions are pure, handle edge cases defensively (maxWords<=0→'', empty→''/0), append the correct U+2026 ellipsis only on actual truncation; no existing code paths modified — zero regression or security risk.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

checklist.detail: at or above the confidence bar
checklist.label: Judge confidence

dimensions.evidence: Diff creates all three functions (normalizeText, wordCount, truncateWords) with exact acceptance-criteria behaviour, a barrel index re-exporting all three, and a vitest suite — the full objective per issue #48.
Only new files under apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/ (normalize-text.ts, word-count.ts, truncate-words.ts, index.ts, index.test.ts); no unrelated files touched, no existing code refactored.

Tests exercise real edge cases (empty/whitespace inputs, mixing whitespace types, boundary maxWords, ellipsis-only-when-truncated); functions compute results genuinely — no hard-coded returns or weakened assertions.

All functions are pure, handle edge cases defensively (maxWords<=0→'', empty→''/0), append the correct U+2026 ellipsis only on actual truncation; no existing code paths modified — zero regression or security risk.
